data.title: Southwest Airlines in charts: Q4 PRASM edges higher as cost pressures remain contained
Eagle Materials gives mixed Q3 results
data.description:
• Eagle Materials press release (EXP): Q3 GAAP EPS of $3.22 misses by $0.18.
  • Revenue of $556M (-0.4% Y/Y) beats by $1.1M.
  • Net Earnings of $102.9 million
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $190.1 million
  • Repurchased approximately 648,000 shares of Eagle’s common stock for $142.6 million

data.title: Dow shares rise after restructuring plan, Q4 earnings beat; 4,500 job cuts
data.description:
Dow Inc. (DOW) shares rose about 3% in premarket trading Thursday after the company announced a broad restructuring initiative and reported fourth-quarter results that beat Wall Street expectations.

The chemical maker (DOW) swung to a profit with earnings adjusted for one-time items of $1.81 a share, topping the consensus estimate for a loss of $0.51 a share. The company reported net sales of $9.5 billion, beating the Wall Street consensus estimate of $9.47 billion, for the three- month period through December.

Its net loss deepened to $1.48 billion, or $2.15 a share, from a year-earlier net loss of $35 million, or $0.08 a share.

Dow swings to profit on adjusted basis

Dow (DOW) reported an operating loss of $0.34 a share for the quarter, compared with break-even operating earnings in the year-ago period. Operating results excluded $1.81 a share of significant items, led by impairment charges tied to the polyurethanes and construction chemicals business and non-cash pension settlement costs.

Operating earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization totaled $741 million in the quarter, down from $1.21 billion a year earlier. Ebitda declined sequentially from $868 million in the third quarter.

Net sales fell 9% from a year earlier, reflecting lower prices and volumes across all operating segments. The company cited price declines, lower operating rates and seasonally weaker demand, partly offset by benefits from ongoing cost-reduction efforts.

Cash provided by operating activities from continuing operations was $298 million, down from $811 million a year earlier. Dow (DOW) returned $251 million to shareholders through dividends during the quarter.

“Dow’s self-help measures continue to gain traction and were evident in our fourth quarter results,” Jim Fitterling, chair and chief executive, said in the earnings release.

'Transform to Outperform' targets $2B earnings uplift

Alongside its earnings report, Dow (DOW) unveiled a new companywide initiative called Transform to Outperform, aimed at simplifying its operating model, resetting its cost structure and modernizing how it serves customers.

The program is expected to deliver at least $2 billion in near-term operating earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization, building on the company’s previously announced $1 billion cost-savings plan. Dow (DOW) said roughly two thirds of the benefit is expected to come from productivity improvements, with the remainder driven by growth initiatives supported by automation and artificial intelligence.

The company expects to incur approximately $1.1 billion to $1.5 billion in one-time costs tied to the program, including severance related to about 4,500 workers.

“As we move forward, Transform to Outperform represents a comprehensive and radical simplification of our operating model,” Fitterling said. “We expect these efforts to provide at least $2 billion in additional near-term earnings while helping Dow set new competitive standards and improve shareholder returns.”

Dow (DOW) said it will begin implementing the initiative this year while engaging local stakeholders in line with regional regulations.

data.title: Lazard beats Q4 estimates
data.description:
• Lazard press release (LAZ): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.80 beats by $0.11.
  • Revenue of $892M (+9.9% Y/Y) beats by $70.13M.
  • Record full-year Financial Advisory adjusted net revenue of $1.8 billion
  • Record full-year Asset Management inflows and total AUM up 12% year-over-year
  • As part of Lazard 2030 vision and long-term growth strategy, the company aims to deliver an adjusted non-compensation ratio between 16% to 20%, with timing dependent on market conditions.

data.title: News Corp launches California Post tabloid this week
data.description:
Rupert Murdoch's News Corp (NWSA) debuted its new daily tabloid California Post this week, marking the New York Post's expansion into the West Coast.

California Post is available in print and online, with copies selling at $3.75 apiece—higher than the $2 price for the New York Post. This is due to higher production costs, Sean Giancola, CEO of New York Post Media Group, told Reuters.

Giancola said he was confident readership would grow in due course, noting that millions of Californians read the New York Post online.

"This is a massive year for California from elections for LA mayor, governor and the midterms to the Super Bowl, Soccer World Cup and our World Series champion Dodgers as they defend their title," Nick Papps, California Post editor-in-chief, said earlier this month.

"It will be a defining year for this great state — and the California Post will be in the middle of it all," he added, vowing a "common-sense approach" to the issues it will cover.

data.title: Trane Technologies beats top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates FY26 outlook
data.description:
• Trane Technologies plc press release (TT): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $2.86 beats by $0.05.
  • Revenue of $5.15B (+5.7% Y/Y) beats by $60M.
  • Strong bookings of $5.8 billion, up 24 percent; organic bookings up 22 percent.
  • Record backlog of $7.8 billion, up 15 percent versus year-end 2024; Americas Commercial HVAC up 25 percent.
  • Book-to-bill was 112 percent, global Commercial HVAC book-to-bill was 114 percent.
    •Enterprise reported revenues were up 6 percent; organic revenues were up 4 percent.
    •GAAP operating margin was down 70 basis points, adjusted operating margin was flat and adjusted EBITDA margin was down 40 basis points.
  • Full-Year 2026 Guidance
    •The Company expects full-year 2026 reported revenue growth of approximately 8.5 percent to 9.5 percent (vs. estimated growth of 7.38%Y/Y); organic revenue growth of approximately 6 percent to 7 percent versus full-year 2025.
    •The Company expects GAAP and adjusted continuing EPS for full-year 2026 of $14.65 to $14.85 (vs. $14.79 consensus).
    •Additional information regarding the Company's 2026 guidance is included in the Company's earnings presentation found at www.tranetechnologies.com in the Investor Relations section.

data.title: Brunswick Non-GAAP EPS of $0.58 beats by $0.01, revenue of $1.33B beats by $120M
data.description:
• Brunswick press release (BC): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.58 beats by $0.01.
  • Revenue of $1.33B (+15.7% Y/Y)  beats by $120M.
  • 2026 Guidance: Net Sales Between $5.6 and $5.8 Billion vs $5.54B consensus; Adjusted Diluted EPS Range of $3.80 - $4.40 vs $4.19 consensus
  • First quarter 2026 revenue of between $1.2 to $1.4 billion, and adjusted diluted EPS of$0.35 to $0.45.

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Thermo Fisher Scientific tops Q4 estimates; to provide FY26 guidance during call
Hennes & Mauritz reports FY results
data.description:
• Hennes & Mauritz press release (HNNMY): FY Non-GAAP EPS of SEK7.58.
  • Revenue of SEK228.29B (-2.6% Y/Y).
  • Gross profit amounted to SEK 121,821 m (125,299)
  • Operating profit increased to SEK 18,395 m (17,306), corresponding to an operating margin of 8.1 percent (7.4).
  • The result after tax increased to SEK 12,085 m (11,584), corresponding to SEK 7.58 (7.21) per share.
  • Cash flow from operating activities after changes in working capital amounted to SEK 31,120 m (31,756)

data.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Non-GAAP EPS of $6.57 beats by $0.12, revenue of $12.21B beats by $320M
data.description:
• Thermo Fisher Scientific press release (TMO): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $6.57 beats by $0.12.
  • Revenue of $12.21B (+7.1% Y/Y) beats by $320M.
  • The company will provide 2026 financial guidance during its earnings conference call this morning at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
